allow: Bash(node -e "const fa = require\('@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons'\); const icons = Object.keys\(fa\).filter\(k => ['faPlay','faPause','faStepBackward','faStepForward','faBackwardStep','faForwardStep','faRandom','faShuffle','faRedo','faRotateRight','faVolumeUp','faVolumeHigh','faVolumeDown','faVolumeLow','faVolumeMute','faVolumeXmark','faFire','faGuitar'].includes\(k\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(icons, null, 2\)\);")
